LongParameterList:TestFixtures.kt$TestFixtures$( id: UUID = UUID.randomUUID(), displayName: String = "session-${id.toString().take(8)}", state: SessionState = SessionState.CREATED, admin: User = user(role = Role.ADMIN), config: SessionConfig = sessionConfig(), openToConnect: Boolean = true, members: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), observers: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), teams: MutableSet<Team> = mutableSetOf(), currentRound: Round? = null, )
